description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted storage cabinet or shelf unit with a modern design. The main structure is made of light wood, featuring a combination of open cubby spaces and a section with four horizontal yellow doors or panels. The open cubbies are arranged in a grid, providing multiple compartments for storage or display. The yellow section likely conceals additional storage behind doors, adding a pop of color and visual interest. The top surface is flat and can be used to support or display objects. Metal mounting brackets are visible at the top, indicating it is designed to be securely attached to a wall.
description: A modern, wall-mounted light wood cabinet with open cubbies and four yellow panel doors, featuring a flat top and metal mounting brackets.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a plain, flat white panel with metal mounting brackets at the top corners.
description_view_1: A side view displaying the light wood grain texture and the cabinet's depth, with a hint of the yellow panel section visible.
description_view_2: The front view reveals the open cubby compartments and four yellow horizontal doors, highlighting the cabinet's main storage features.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, again showing the wood grain and the yellow panel section protruding slightly.
